summary: test_entering_gated_state_seeds_pending_promises exercises real apply_transition, asserting both declared responsibilities (tests-pass, pr-opened) are seeded PENDING with correct descriptions on the WORKING history entry; freshness-on-re-entry isn't exercised by this specific test (GatedWorkflow has no cycle back to WORKING via normal transitions) but is proven by the sibling REQ-001.5.8 test using the same shared _promised() seeding code, and _promised() always builds a new list from class-level declarations rather than copying a prior entry.
